attempts.test_code:
import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    """
    The knapsack algorithm must consider items whose weight exactly equals
    the remaining capacity.  The buggy implementation uses 'weight < j',
    excluding such items and yielding suboptimal results.
    """
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]  # optimal solution: take the item weighing 3
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == 10, (
        "Expected optimal value 10 when an item exactly fills the knapsack, "
        "but got incorrect result due to weight comparison bug."
    )
